steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The word “while” introduces a contrast: state taxes have “almost no effect” while employment, housing, and climate are “strong influences.” This reveals which factors matter more.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
“Overshadowed by” means made secondary to or less important than something else — exactly expressing that state taxes are less influential than other factors.

The other choices either suggest equivalence or fail to capture the hierarchy of importance.

C is correct.
